prompt: List supported deterministic extractors and URL patterns.
rationale: Listing available deterministic known-site extractors is web_extract action=list, not page extraction.

prompt: Inspect this raw README URL for deterministic markers: print length, positions for ## Tools and scrape, and regex matches for web_[a-z_]+ without writing a Python script: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/0xMassi/webclaw/main/README.md
rationale: Marker positions, contains checks, bounded excerpts, and regex matches are deterministic text inspection, so use web_extract action=pattern instead of shell/Python or model-backed adhoc extraction.

prompt: Get typed npm metadata for https://www.npmjs.com/package/pi-scraper.
rationale: A known npm package URL should use deterministic typed extraction through web_extract action=vertical instead of ad hoc LLM JSON.

prompt: Get typed DeepWiki metadata for https://deepwiki.com/owner/repo.
rationale: A DeepWiki URL is a supported known-site deterministic extractor case under web_extract action=vertical.

prompt: Extract the structured sections and API signature from this MDN/Docusaurus docs page as deterministic JSON: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Fetch_API
rationale: Documentation platform pages with sections/API reference layout are deterministic docs-site vertical extraction, so use web_extract action=vertical extractor=docsite instead of flat scrape or ad hoc model JSON.

prompt: Extract structured metadata and top comments from this Reddit post: https://www.reddit.com/r/announcements/comments/14f4h6s/reddit_api_changes_subreddit_blackouts_and_how/
rationale: Known-site structured extraction for a public Reddit post belongs to the reddit vertical extractor, not generic scraping or broad search.

prompt: Search this Jupyter notebook JSON for code cells mentioning 'tool calls' using JSONPath: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openai/openai-cookbook/main/examples/How_to_count_tokens_with_tiktoken.ipynb
rationale: Deterministic JSONPath field selection and excerpt search over a notebook or API JSON payload belongs to web_extract action=pattern with sourceFormat=json and jsonPaths, replacing one-off Python scripts.

prompt: From this arbitrary product page, extract name and price as JSON.
rationale: Arbitrary page JSON/schema extraction is LLM-backed web_extract action=adhoc when no deterministic vertical applies.

prompt: Summarize this single page in five bullets.
rationale: A one-page or provided-content summary uses web_extract action=summarize, not multi-source research.

prompt: Summarize https://example.com.
rationale: One concrete URL with a page-scoped summary request should use web_extract action=summarize, not multi-source research.

prompt: Extract JSON from GitHub repo URL https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript.
rationale: Known GitHub repository URL should prefer deterministic web_extract action=vertical over ad hoc extraction.

prompt: Extract every article title from https://example.com/blog using the CSS selector h2.post-title.
rationale: A single CSS/XPath selector against one page is deterministic selector extraction, so use web_extract action=selector instead of adhoc model JSON.

prompt: Extract the API surface — endpoints and function signatures — from this SDK reference page: https://example.com/api/reference.
rationale: Pulling endpoint and signature API surface from a reference page is deterministic web_extract action=surface, not flat scrape or adhoc JSON.

prompt: Extract fields from https://example.com/product using this CSS map: title -> h1, price -> span.price.
rationale: A named CSS selector map over one page is deterministic field extraction via web_extract action=css-extract, not adhoc LLM JSON.

prompt: Extract nodes by XPath //h1 and //span[@class='price'] from https://example.com/product.
rationale: XPath node selection over one page is deterministic web_extract action=xpath-extract, not adhoc model extraction.

prompt: Extract all email addresses from https://example.com/contact with a regex.
rationale: Pulling all regex matches as structured output from one page is web_extract action=regex-extract, not pattern inspection or adhoc JSON.

prompt: Find the paragraphs on https://example.com/policy most semantically similar to 'refund window'.
rationale: Ranking page passages by semantic similarity to a query is web_extract action=cosine, not regex or adhoc extraction.

prompt: Get typed metadata for this YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
rationale: A known YouTube watch URL is deterministic typed extraction via web_extract action=vertical extractor=youtube, not adhoc JSON.

prompt: Get typed PyPI package metadata for https://pypi.org/project/requests/.
rationale: A known PyPI project URL is deterministic typed extraction via web_extract action=vertical extractor=pypi.

prompt: Extract typed paper metadata from https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762.
rationale: A known arXiv abstract URL is deterministic typed extraction via web_extract action=vertical extractor=arxiv.

prompt: Get structured metadata for this Hacker News thread: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=12345678
rationale: A known Hacker News item URL is deterministic typed extraction via web_extract action=vertical extractor=hackernews.

prompt: Get typed model card metadata for https://huggingface.co/bert-base-uncased.
rationale: A known Hugging Face model URL is deterministic typed extraction via web_extract action=vertical extractor=huggingface_model.

prompt: From this raw changelog, pull 200 characters around each BREAKING marker: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/example/repo/main/CHANGELOG.md
rationale: Bounded excerpts around deterministic text markers is web_extract action=pattern, not adhoc model extraction.

prompt: Summarize this page in 3 sentences: https://example.com/post
rationale: A one-page sentence-count summary is web_extract action=summarize, not multi-source research.

prompt: From this arbitrary blog page, pull the author and publish date as JSON: https://example.com/blog/post-1
rationale: Arbitrary-page custom JSON/schema extraction with no deterministic vertical is web_extract action=adhoc.
